text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention * Hispanic/Latino Community 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Hispanic/Latino Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD EUGENE MAIN OFFICE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides recovery services for alcohol and substance abuse, gambling, and other addictions. Early intervention classes for youth who have received minor-in-possession are also available. Treatment by phone or telehealth. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Recovery Center Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Other services by appointment only Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SPRINGFIELD EDUCATION OFFICE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & EDUCATION SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide individual and group therapy for individuals seeking treatment for addictions, including problem gambling. Also provide peer, educational, and prevention services for adults, youth, and families. 1621 Centennial Boulevard Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: 11am-9pm Monday-Friday (541) 686-8483 2 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES
